items.title: INTO THE AM Men's Graphic T-Shirts S - 4XL Premium Short Sleeve Tees Cool Nature Designs
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: into, shirts, 4xl, premium, tees, nature, designs. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
